THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. THE MISADDRESSED MEET AND CONFER LETTER DID NOT AFFORD THE OPPORTUNITY TO ACTUALLY MEET AND CONFER. SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Willis C. Silverthorne, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Michael Campbell
Monica Lee, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: PG & E

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant PG&E's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The misaddressed meet and confer letter did not afford the opportunity to actually meet and confer. Sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
